narrative:
North Royalton-02-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 890 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
